Headline: #30 South Chicago Temporary Reroute near 91st/Burley
ShortDescription: 30 South Chicago buses temp. rerouted due to, street blockage near 91st/Burley.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#30 South Chicago buses temp. rerouted due to, street blockage near 91st/Burley.

Northbound buses will operate via 91st, Buffalo, and 92nd including the normal route streets.

Southbound buses will operate via 92nd, Buffalo, and 91st.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #77 Belmont Temporary Reroute at Belmont/ Halsted
ShortDescription: 77 Belmont  buses are temporarily rerouted via Belmont/ Halsted/ Addison/Halsted due to, Street Blockage near Belmont/ Halsted.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#77 Belmont  buses are temporarily rerouted via Belmont/ Halsted/ Addison/Halsted due to, Street Blockage near Belmont/ Halsted.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #156 LaSalle Temporary Northbound Reroute near Belmont/Halsted
ShortDescription: 156 NB buses are temp. rerouted via Inner Lakeshore Drive/ West Sheridan/ Pine Grove/ Irving Park/ Inner Lake Shore Drive near Belmont/ Halsted.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#156 Northbound buses are temporarily rerouted via Inner Lakeshore Drive/ West Sheridan/ Pine Grove/ Irving Park/ Inner Lake Shore Drive due to, Street Blockage near Belmont/ Halsted.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
